TextRun.Text: a way for me to share things
10. Tell your parents how much their trust

RichText.Text: 1. healthy, supportive relationships 2. establish a trusting relationship with 3. the establishment of ... (n.) 4. the belief in someone's reliability rely on.... a reliable man 5. place your trust in another individual（个人） 6. It ’s easier for both parties to discuss sensitive issues. (be sensitive to...) 7. figure out a way for me to share things without you reacting right away 8. spend time with someone significant 9. tell them how much that means to you 10. Tell your parents how much their trust matters to you. 11. be frank with your parents 12. gain a better understanding of... 13. regaining trust takes time and patience 14. trust is a two-way street

TextRun.Text: 10. 告诉你的父母他们的信任

RichText.Text: 1. 健康、相互支持的关系 2. 与……建立信任关系 3. ……的建立 4. 相信某人的可靠性； 依靠……；一个可靠的人 5. 信任另一个人(place:放置，安放) 6. 双方更容易讨论敏感的问题。 （对……敏感） 7. 找到/弄清楚一个方法让我分享 事情，而你不用立刻做出反应 8. 与重要的人共度时光 9. 告诉他们这对你有多重要 10. 告诉你的父母他们的信任 对你有多重要 11. 对父母坦诚 12. 获得更好地理解…… 13. 重新获得信任需要时间和耐心 14. 信任是双向的
